_comment: Scenario catalogue for ise_runner. The driver shell script (run_all_scenarios.sh) currently hard-codes a sensible default; this file documents every available knob so a human can easily tweak a thesis run without touching C code.

scenarios.name: baseline
scenarios.description: Per-signal baseline latency and overhead table

scenarios.name: throughput
scenarios.description: Sustained 2 s throughput on a single bus

scenarios.name: attacks
scenarios.description: Run every attack kind against a protected channel
